scripts.py:format: uv run isort tests && uv run black tests
scripts.py:lint: uv run ruff check tests && uv run black --check tests && uv run isort --check-only tests
scripts.verify: npm run verify:frontend && npm run verify:rust && npm run verify:python
scripts.verify:frontend: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.verify:rust: pkg-config --exists gdk-3.0 2>/dev/null && (cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml) || echo 'Skipping Rust checks (GTK system libs not found – run in an environment with Tauri prerequisites installed)'
scripts.verify:python: uv sync --quiet && npm run py:lint && npm run py:test
